data.acceptance:
- The standalone "Escalations" button (UserRoundCheck icon) no longer renders in the action slot when the finalcut view is active.
- The Escalations tab in the ViewSwitcher navigation bar is unchanged and continues to work.
- When the finalcut view is active, the action slot follows the same visibility logic as other views that don't show an action (e.g., hidden placeholder or empty).
- Lint, typecheck, and build pass.
